Team Uniforms

Custom Soccer Kits & Uniforms: The Complete Team Guide

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 9, 2026 ☕ 10 min read
Home › Blog › Custom Soccer Kits Guide

Here is a fact most club managers do not know: the odds are your favorite professional team's replica shirts, or at least their training wear, came out of Sialkot, Pakistan - the city that produces the majority of the world's hand-stitched footballs and a huge share of its teamwear. When you order custom soccer kits factory-direct from Sialkot, you are using the same supply chain as the big brands with none of their markup. This guide covers everything: kit anatomy, sublimation design, real costs, goalkeeper kits, youth sizing and the ordering calendar. All 30 designs in our soccer kit catalog are built to the specs below.

What Makes a Proper Match Kit

  • Jersey: 140–160 GSM interlock or micromesh polyester - light, wicking, and the canvas for full sublimation. Heavier fabric is a training-top spec, not a match spec.
  • Shorts: 130–150 GSM woven or knit poly with inner drawcord; keeper shorts get light hip padding on request.
  • Socks: knitted (not printed) in club colors with sublimated or woven turnover details - ordered in the same run so the set matches.
  • Construction: flat-lock seams (no chafe at full sprint), double-needle hems, taped neck. Numbers and names sublimated - they cannot peel off mid-slide-tackle.

Why Sublimation Owns Soccer Kit Design

Pinstripes, sashes, hoops, gradients, subtle geometric patterns - every iconic kit style is a printed pattern, and sublimation reproduces all of them at zero extra cost because the design is dyed into the fabric itself. Sponsor logos (the lifeblood of grassroots clubs) are included the same way: front-of-shirt sponsor, sleeve sponsors, and back-of-shorts marks all printed in one pass. The only add-on worth paying for is an embroidered club crest (+$1.5–3/shirt) - the raised badge is a tradition worth keeping. Details on the technique: our decoration guide.

Real 2026 Costs

PackagePer set (20-set order)
Match kit: jersey + shorts$32–48
Full kit: jersey + shorts + socks$38–55
Home + away double order (per kit)$30–44
Goalkeeper kit (padded, long-sleeve)$40–58
Training bibs / warm-up tees$8–15

UK team-shop equivalents run £60–90 per printed kit; US dealers $70–110. Every design on our soccer kits page shows its exact range, names and numbers included. MOQ is 20 sets, mixed youth-to-adult sizes.

Don't Forget the Goalkeeper

The most common ordering mistake in grassroots soccer: 20 outfield kits, zero keeper kits. Your keeper needs a contrasting colorway (required by the laws of the game), long-sleeve option, and ideally padded shorts. Order 2–3 keeper sets inside the same production run - as a colorway variant of your main design it costs a few dollars more per set, not a separate MOQ.

The Season-Ready Ordering Calendar

  1. 10 weeks before kickoff: choose a base design from the catalog or send your badge and colors; collect player sizes with a size chart (never guess youth sizes).
  2. 8–9 weeks out: free mockup in 24–48h - iterate home and away colorways together to keep the club identity coherent.
  3. 7 weeks out: sample kit in 5–7 days; wash it twice and check the sublimation and fit before approving.
  4. 4–6 weeks out: bulk production (2–4 weeks) with final squad names/numbers.
  5. 1–2 weeks out: DDP delivery in 3–7 days, duties handled - see how we serve US, UK, Australian and EU clubs.

Youth Clubs & Academies: The Multi-Team Order

Academies running U8 through U16 should order every age group in one production run: one club design, shared across squads, sizes mixed freely - a 6-team academy easily consolidates into one 90–120 set order at the best price tier, with spare blank-number kits per size band for mid-season joiners. It is the same play American AAU basketball programs use, and it is where factory-direct pricing compounds hardest.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much do custom soccer kits cost?

Factory-direct sublimated kits run $32-48 per jersey + shorts set at 20-set quantities ($38-55 with matching socks), including names, numbers, sponsor logos and any pattern - pinstripes, hoops, gradients. UK/US team-shop equivalents cost 2-3x more.

What is the minimum order for soccer kits?

20 sets per design at FABRIOZA, mixing youth and adult sizes freely. Goalkeeper colorway variants count within the same design's run.

Why order soccer kits from Sialkot, Pakistan?

Sialkot is the world's soccer manufacturing capital - it produces most of the world's hand-stitched footballs and teamwear for global brands. Ordering factory-direct uses the same supply chain without the brand markup.

How long does a custom soccer kit order take?

Free mockup in 24-48 hours, sample kit in 5-7 days, production 2-4 weeks, DDP shipping 3-7 days - about 5-6 weeks total. Start 10 weeks before the season.

Can you embroider our club crest?

Yes - embroidered crests add $1.5-3 per shirt over the all-sublimated version and are the most requested premium touch. Sponsor logos are sublimated in at no charge.

Get Your Club's Soccer Kit Quote

Send your club colors and badge - free mockup in 24-48 hours, full home/away kits from $32 per set at 20-set quantities, made in Sialkot.
